ui_empty.message: No built-in test cards yet. See the README to add cards for this gateway.

status_no_field.message: No $1 card number field found on this page. Make sure you are on the card input page.

status_fill_failed.message: Found the $1 card page but failed to fill the card number (the page may have changed).

status_filled_partial.message: Filled the $1 test card, but $2 not found.

status_stripe_no_ack.message: No response from Stripe fields. Make sure this page uses Stripe Elements.

card_ecpay_success_note.message: ECPay official test card. Expiry must be in the future; in the test environment enter mock SMS code 1234 for 3D verification.

card_ecpay_expired_note.message: ECPay has no decline card numbers; the official way to test failure is the same test card with an expired date, which fails at submission (expired-card error).

card_newebpay_onetime_note.message: NewebPay official test card (one-time). Any expiry month/year and any 3-digit CVC.

card_newebpay_declined_note.message: In the NewebPay test environment, any card number other than the test cards is always declined—useful to verify the failure flow.

card_stripe_amex_note.message: American Express success test card (15-digit number, 4-digit CVC).

card_stripe_3ds_note.message: Test card that requires 3D Secure verification and triggers the verification flow.

card_stripe_3ds_required_note.message: Requires 3D Secure verification on every charge.

card_stripe_expired_note.message: Returns card_declined / expired_card (still fill a future expiry).
